notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Zach Neto. Kyle Tucker to 3rd. Alex Call to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Zach Neto. Kyle Tucker to 3rd. Alex Call to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Ward grounds into a double play, second baseman Oswald Peraza to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Alex Call to 3rd. Dalton Rushing out at 2nd. Ryan Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Ward rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Ward grounds into a double play, second baseman Oswald Peraza to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Alex Call to 3rd. Dalton Rushing out at 2nd. Ryan Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Ward grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Madrigal to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Dalton Rushing out at 2nd. Ryan Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Alex Call reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Zach Neto. Kyle Tucker to 3rd. Alex Call to 2nd.
